basics.name: Md Atik Enam
basics.summary: Human-Centered Computing researcher studying accessible mobility, human-embodied AI teaming, older adults and AI, and computer science learning in a changing education landscape.

portfolio.name: Inclusive AI for Older Adults
portfolio.description: Qualitative discovery on older adults' trust, mental models, privacy concerns, and adoption expectations for LLM-based chatbots.

portfolio.name: Accessible iHMI for Autonomous Vehicles
portfolio.description: Mixed-methods evaluation of an accessible autonomous-vehicle interface with participants with and without disabilities.

portfolio.name: Embodied AI Roles in Autonomous Vehicles
portfolio.description: Quantitative experiment on AI teammate roles, influence styles, trust, and latent response profiles in autonomous-vehicle interfaces.
